problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: If Hydrogel swelling/shrinking response is applied to low, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
